sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61620" key="laqro/fagos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαθρόφᾰγ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n61620.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating secretly</tr_>, Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζοπαδασπίδας, ζοφοδερκίας</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
